---
name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a new professional profile to add to the library
title: "[New skill] "
labels: new-skill
---

**Profile name**
e.g. "Site Reliability Engineer".

**Category**
`dev`, `security`, `design-product`, `business-strategy`, `marketing`, `data`,
`context-specific`, or a new one (explain why none of the existing ones fit).

**Why is this profile useful?**
What kind of tasks should trigger it, and why isn't an existing skill already covering
that ground?

**Are you willing to submit the PR yourself?**
Yes / No — if yes, see `CONTRIBUTING.md` for the process (everything is generated from
`generate.py`).
